attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT DISTINCT
1 AS BATCH_ID
,ST.QUOTE_OBJECT_ID               
,ST.DEAL_OBJECT_ID                
,ST.OFR_REWARD_ID                 
,ST.OFR_REWARD_CODE               
,ST.OFR_REWARD_NAME               
,ST.OFR_REWARD_VERSION            
,ST.PROGRAM_NUMBER                
,ST.CPA_CODE                      
,ST.PROGRAM_NAME                  
,ST.IS_OFR_REWARD_SELECTED        
,ST.OFR_REWARD_VERSION_APPLIED    
,ST.TRY_BUY_FLAG                  
,ST.TRADE_IN_FLAG                 
,ST.ENROLLMENT_FLAG               
,ST.SCOPE                         
,ST.APPROVED_QUOTE_TOTAL          
,ST.PREVIOUSLY_APPROVED           
,ST.CPA_CODE_ID                   
,ST.PROGRAM_ID                    
,ST.STATUS                        
,ST.AUTO_APPROVED                 
,ST.OVERLAP_CHKREQ                
,ST.SFDCOVERLAP_CHKREQ            
,ST.CCW_NSDEAL_OVERLAP_CHKREQ     
,ST.CCW_SAMEPARTNER_OVERLAPCHKREQ 
,ST.REJECTED      
,CAST(LEFT(OREPLACE(ST.STATUS_DATE,'T',' '), 19) as TIMESTAMP(0)) AS STATUS_DATE                                  
,ST.ADVANTAGE_PRICING             
,ST.AUTO_APPLIED                  
,ST.CAN_REAPPLY                   
,ST.REAPPLIED                     
,ST.OFFER                         
,ST.DESCRIPTION                   
,ST.CREATED_BY
,CAST(LEFT(OREPLACE(ST.CREATED_ON,'T',' '), 19) as TIMESTAMP(0)) AS CREATED_ON
,ST.UPDATED_BY
,CAST(LEFT(OREPLACE(ST.UPDATED_ON,'T',' '), 19) as TIMESTAMP(0)) AS UPDATED_ON
,ST.UPDATED_BY_KAFKA 
,CAST(LEFT(OREPLACE(ST.UPDATED_ON_KAFKA,'T',' '), 19) as TIMESTAMP(0)) AS UPDATED_ON_KAFKA
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATE_DATETIME
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) as EDW_CREATE_DTM
,USER as EDW_CREATE_USER
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM
,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER             
,ST.OFFSET_NUMBER                 
,ST.PARTITION_NUMBER              
,ST.MESSAGE_SEQUENCE_NUMBER
,'I' AS ACTION_CODE
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_INT_RAW_CQ_OFR_RWRD_KFKA_FF ST 
/*COMMENTED AS PART OF CCW DATA FIX AUG REL  AS NO ATTRIBUTE IS USED SD  COMMENTED THIS JOIN*/
/*LEFT JOIN 
(SELECT OBJECT_ID , CREATED_BY , CREATED_ON , UPDATED_BY , UPDATED_ON FROM $$STGDB.ST_INT_CQ_DEAL_KAFKA_FF FF
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY OPTY_ID ORDER BY MESSAGE_SEQUENCE_NUMBER DESC)=1 )SD
 ON ST.DEAL_OBJECT_ID = SD.OBJECT_ID*/
 WHERE
NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_INT_RW_CQ_OFFER_RWRD_KFK EL
WHERE ST.DEAL_OBJECT_ID  = EL.DEAL_OBJECT_ID 
/* AND ST.OFR_REWARD_CODE  = EL.OFR_REWARD_CODE --Commenting as part of CCW data fix*/
AND ST.MESSAGE_SEQUENCE_NUMBER = EL.MESSAGE_SEQUENCE_NUMBER)
